summary: Cycle J (10th overnight-triage fire of UTC 2026-05-23, ~55min after cycle I — 4th consecutive ~1h cycle post-E→F outlier; cadence interpretation overwhelming) ran heartbeat-only. Both queues absent on disk for 31st consecutive cycle. regen-all clean: ALL CHECKS PASSED, round-trip 0 failures sustained (24s elapsed at 13:01:38Z; heartbeat at 13:01:57Z status=PASS). Three substantive findings beyond pure heartbeat: (1) GATE-FAIL semantics 5th-observation corroboration — cycle J found heartbeat status=GATE-FAIL at cycle open (~13:00Z) written by post-commit-hook at 12:06:03Z for HEAD 798c6ce4 (cycle I's commit). This is positive direct evidence captured verbatim, adding to cycle F's 2 observations (ca542750 + f5a3168b) + cycle H's ce095dfd + cycle I's d10285c9 for a 5-observation pattern. (2) Routine-cron 3rd negative case confirmed — 71f41270 (post-cycle-I routine cron, AMD-019/020 auto-clean) landed between cycle I's commit and cycle J open, but the heartbeat at cycle J open still showed head_sha=798c6ce4 from 12:06:03Z, NOT head_sha=71f41270. This means 71f41270's post-commit hook did NOT touch the heartbeat, matching cycles H+I identical findings for e4db2359 and 2ac7d595 — making the routine-cron-doesn't-touch-heartbeat finding 3-observation-confirmed. (3) Cadence natural-variability across 4 consecutive cycles — I→J ~55min, H→I ~55min, G→H ~55min, F→G ~56min — four consecutive ~1h cycles after the E→F ~5h outlier; cadence interpretation overwhelming. Founder I→J window quiet (0 substantive + 1 routine cron 71f41270), consistent with sleep continuation. Three pre-existing untracked Founder files unchanged from cycle I close. Single yellow user-context-gate continues (main-flows.html ~8.45d stale, was 8.41d at I — natural drift). Metric-integrity attestation: HONEST — empty-inbox honestly recorded; GATE-FAIL 5th-observation is positive direct evidence captured verbatim; routine-cron 3rd negative case is direct evidence from heartbeat state read at cycle open. Seven carry-over Founder action items preserved unchanged from cycle I close (no new items, no drops; cycle J sharpens evidence on items #1 cadence-4th-cycle-confirmation and #7 GATE-FAIL 5th-observation + 3rd routine-cron negative case). Token consumption at 94%/100% wellness threshold (94k/100k); cycle K likely crosses threshold and triggers rest checkpoint per honest discipline.
founder_action_items: Cron cadence - now 15th consecutive flag. Cycle J's I→J gap (~55min) is the 4th consecutive ~1h cycle after the E→F ~5h outlier. The natural-variability interpretation is overwhelming; the E→F outlier is fully accounted for as a single anomaly event. Original Founder-action remains: edit overnight-triage cron prompt to add Step-0 guard that exits clean if `git log --since='3h'` shows no inbox motion AND last regen-all heartbeat is < 60 min old. Founder may also consider that 31 consecutive empty-inbox cycles is itself a signal worth a Step-0 guard regardless of cadence variability.

Heartbeat `status: GATE-FAIL` field semantics - NOW 5-OBSERVATION-CONFIRMED + 3x ROUTINE-CRON NEGATIVE-CASE CONFIRMED. Cycle J found heartbeat status=GATE-FAIL at cycle open (~13:00Z) written by post-commit-hook at 12:06:03Z for HEAD 798c6ce4 (cycle I's commit). Combined with cycle F's two observations (ca542750 + f5a3168b) + cycle H's ce095dfd + cycle I's d10285c9, the pattern is now 5-observation-confirmed: post-commit-hook for `Overnight triage ...` commits writes status=GATE-FAIL within ~1-2min. Critically, between cycle I's commit and cycle J open, one routine cron commit (71f41270 AMD-019/020 auto-clean) landed — but the heartbeat at cycle J open still showed head_sha=798c6ce4 from 12:06:03Z, NOT head_sha=71f41270. This matches cycles H+I identical findings for e4db2359 and 2ac7d595 — making the routine-cron-doesn't-touch-heartbeat finding 3-observation-confirmed. Founder-action recommendation stable (unchanged from cycle I): inspect `.husky/post-commit` to find (1) what `Overnight triage ...` commits trigger that AMD-019/020 auto-clean does NOT, and (2) why that trigger writes status=GATE-FAIL instead of PASS. Cycle J stops short of inspecting the hook source — that crosses into 'investigate, propose fix' territory which is a Founder-decision boundary for governance change.
